mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (content, delivery_type, grade, marking, price, risk_level, size, sport, status, team, title, uniform_name, view_count, wish_count, seller_id) VALUES (#{content}, #{deliveryType}, #{grade}, #{marking}, #{price}, #{riskLevel}, #{size}, #{sport}, #{status}, #{team}, #{title}, #{uniformName}, #{viewCount}, #{wishCount}, #{sellerId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post ORDER BY post_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET status = #{status} WHERE post_id = #{postId}
